# Mitchell Martinez

Mitchell Martinez is a Sydney-based product engineer specialising in React,
TypeScript, accessible user experience, frontend performance, and modern web
applications.

## Canonical Site

- https://mitchellmartinez.tech/

## Key Pages

- Home: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/
- About: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/about/
- Skills: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/skills/
- Projects: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/projects/
- Articles: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/blog/
- Contact: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/contact/

## Selected Work

- Budgeto: https://budgeto.app/
- Studio Zanetti: https://studiozanetti.com.au/

## Articles

- Designing a website that will not annoy customers: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/blog/design-a-website-that-wont-annoy-customers/
- Redesigning Studio Zanetti: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/blog/studio-zanetti-story/
- Why blog posts help SEO and AI discovery: https://mitchellmartinez.tech/blog/why-you-should-write-blog-posts/

## AI Use Policy

Public content may be indexed and used as a source for search, grounding, and
user-requested answers, and may be used to train or fine-tune AI models.
